overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed showing a hooded protagonist in white robes walking through a historic Islamic palace or fortress in Baghdad. The character moves through covered arcades with stone arches, emerges onto open terraces with panoramic city views, and traverses elevated walkways while passing guards in red uniforms.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered palace corridor with repeating stone arches

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered arcade, passing potted plants and decorative stonework

notable_agents.action: guard in red uniform standing near the archway ahead
guard holding a spear standing by the wall

entered.detail: large pointed stone arch forming the corridor passage
ornate carved stone balustrade with geometric patterns
large ceramic pots with green shrubs and flowers
heavy carved wooden door with metal studs
rectangular pool with lily pads visible through the arches

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a covered palace corridor with repeating stone arches and diffused natural light. The protagonist walks forward past potted plants and decorative stonework, approaching guards standing near the archway ahead. A water feature is visible through the openings on the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: open palace terrace overlooking inner courtyard

events.description: exits covered arcade into bright sunlight onto open terrace with view of courtyard

agents.ego_description: emerging from the covered walkway onto the sunlit terrace and walking along the railing

notable_agents.action: guard standing near the terrace edge overlooking the courtyard

entered.detail: low stone wall with decorative lattice pattern overlooking the courtyard
large dome with blue and gold tile decoration on distant building
tall palm trees visible in the courtyard below
two-story stone buildings with arched windows surrounding the courtyard

segments.scene_description: The character exits the covered arcade into bright sunlight onto an open terrace. The scene reveals a panoramic view of the palace courtyard with a blue-tiled dome visible in the distance. The protagonist walks along the stone balcony railing, passing a guard standing near the edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated terrace with panoramic city overlook

events.description: character slows and looks out over the cityscape from the balcony edge before continuing

agents.ego_description: walking along the terrace railing while observing the panoramic view of Baghdad and distant domes

notable_agents.action: guard in red uniform and turban walking in the opposite direction

entered.detail: massive dome with intricate blue tile patterns and gold accents
dense cluster of buildings and minarets stretching to the horizon with heat haze
thick carved stone column supporting the terrace structure

segments.scene_description: Walking along the open terrace, the character takes in the panoramic view of the city of Baghdad stretching to the horizon. A large decorated dome dominates the left side of the frame while the protagonist passes a guard walking in the opposite direction. The stone balcony railing continues along the edge of the elevated walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: vine-covered pergola walkway with hanging fabric

events.description: enters shaded pergola area with hanging vines and green fabric canopies overhead

agents.ego_description: walking through the shaded pergola passage with climbing vines and fabric overhead

notable_agents.action: figure in dark clothing standing at the overlook point ahead

entered.detail: wooden structure overhead covered with dense green vines and hanging fabric
large terracotta storage pots grouped along the wall
carved wooden bench with woven seat against the wall
wall with blue and white geometric tile patterns

segments.scene_description: The character enters a shaded pergola walkway covered with dense green vines and hanging fabric canopies. Large clay pots and a wooden bench line the walls while the large decorated dome remains visible in the distance to the left. The lighting shifts to diffused natural light filtered through the vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow elevated walkway with stone walls

agents.ego_description: walking along the narrow elevated path approaching and passing guards in red uniforms

notable_agents.action: guard in red uniform and turban standing watch with spear
guard walking ahead on the narrow path

entered.detail: elevated path barely wide enough for two people with drop on one side
tall wall with decorative blue tile border running along the left side
tall rectangular tower with arched windows visible ahead

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character walking along a narrow elevated stone walkway with a tall tiled wall on the left. The protagonist approaches and passes guards in red uniforms standing watch, while the large decorated dome remains visible in the background. The path leads toward a tower structure in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a historic palace that transitions from enclosed stone corridors to open sunlit terraces and finally into shaded garden walkways. It begins within a covered arcade of repeating stone arches and diffused light, moving past potted plants and water features toward guards stationed at the exit. As the character steps out of the shadows, the scene opens into bright sunlight on an elevated terrace, revealing a panoramic view of Baghdad and a distant blue-tiled dome. The camera then follows the protagonist along the stone balcony railing, passing guards and taking in the city skyline before shifting into a shaded pergola draped in green vines and fabric canopies. Finally, the path narrows into an elevated stone walkway bordered by a tall tiled wall, passing guards in red uniforms as the route leads toward a distant tower.
